headline: Royal Society May Consider Expelling Elon Musk: Has He Gone Too Far?
summary: The Royal Society is reportedly under pressure to expel Elon Musk from its fellowship amid concerns over his controversial statements and potential impact on the institution's reputation.

headline: Leaked Data: Huge Pay Gap In Favor Of AI Engineers At Microsoft
summary: Leaked Microsoft pay data shows a substantial disparity in favor of AI engineers, underlining the company's significant investment in AI.

headline: Intel Stock Was Added To Dow Jones Index In 1999 – Here's How The Stock Has Performed Since
summary: Intel stock was one of the first two Nasdaq stocks to join the Dow Jones Industrial Average. Here's how the stock has performed since history was made.

headline: Tesla Gets Relief In Europe, Ford's Electrification Struggles, Lucid Boasts Of Tech Leadership And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: The struggles of the EV industry is evident from developments in the space, with a tech analysts stating that we are in the "dead of an EV winter."

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Tesla, Snowflake, Broadcom — And Raoul Pal Advocates Bitcoin Before AI
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week. Here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The three major averages posted gains for the week, with the Dow up nearly 1.3%, the Nasdaq gaining 1.4%, and the S&P 500 rising 1.45%.

headline: ChatGPT-Maker OpenAI Taps Former Meta Exec To Drive Strategy Amid Growing Exodus
summary: OpenAI has hired former Meta executive Irina Kofman to lead strategic initiatives, focusing on safety and preparedness, as part of its broader strategy to strengthen leadership amidst intense competition in the AI sector.

headline: Apple To Unveil iPhone 16, Watches, And AirPods At September 10 Event: Report
summary: Apple is all set to launch the iPhone 16 alongside the new Apple Watch and AirPods at an event on September 10, days after a leaked invite pointed at the possibility.
